Question:
We will perform a linear regression using AIREADI data from 2023-2025, we will exclude anyone who is missing study group and who has missing values in the following variables: retinal pigment epithelium layer average, glaucoma diagnosis, cataract diagnosis, diabetic retinopathy diagnosis, AMD diagnosis, retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis.
Other variables to consider will include age, glaucoma diagnosis, cataract diagnosis, diabetic retinopathy diagnosis, AMD diagnosis, retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye. The main variable of interst if study group, and the outcome is retinal pigment epithelium layer average.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: linear regression

Dataset: AIREADI

Period of Interest: 2023-2025

Inclusion Criteria:
None

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing study group
- missing retinal pigment epithelium layer average
- missing glaucoma diagnosis
- missing cataract diagnosis
- missing diabetic retinopathy diagnosis
- missing AMD diagnosis
- missing retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis

Covariates:
- age
- glaucoma diagnosis
- cataract diagnosis
- diabetic retinopathy diagnosis
- AMD diagnosis
- retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye

Predictor:
- study group

Outcome:
- retinal pigment epithelium layer average

SQL:
-- TEMP TABLE FOR "study group", "study group"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_study_group;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_study_group AS
SELECT person_id, "study_group" AS "study_group"
FROM aireadi.participants;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_study_group ON temp_master_study_group (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "retinal pigment epithelium layer average", "retinal pigment epithelium layer average"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer AS
SELECT person_id, "retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer" AS "retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer"
FROM aireadi.retinal_layer_thickness;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer ON temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "glaucoma diagnosis", "glaucoma diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "cataract diagnosis", "cataract diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetic retinopathy diagnosis", "diabetic retinopathy diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "amd diagnosis", "amd diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both AS
SELECT person_id, "age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" AS "age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both ON temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis", "retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye AS
SELECT person_id, "retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye" AS "retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye ON temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age AS
SELECT person_id, "age" AS "age"
FROM aireadi.participants;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age ON temp_master_age (person_id);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_study_group
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_age;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_person_id ON temp_all_ids (person_id);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.person_id,
    t0."study_group",
    t1."retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer",
    t2."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t3."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t4."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t5."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both",
    t6."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye",
    t7."age"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_study_group t0 ON a.person_id = t0.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer t1 ON a.person_id = t1.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes t2 ON a.person_id = t2.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes t3 ON a.person_id = t3.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes t4 ON a.person_id = t4.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both t5 ON a.person_id = t5.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye t6 ON a.person_id = t6.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age t7 ON a.person_id = t7.person_id;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_person_id    
    ON final_master_table (person_id);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients from final_master_table as no specific inclusion criteria were provided.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing study group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."study_group" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing retinal pigment epithelium layer average
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing glaucoma diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing cataract diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing diabetic retinopathy diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing AMD diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.2 Glaucoma Diagnosis
-- Extract glaucoma diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_glaucoma_diagnosis AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "glaucoma_diagnosis"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.3 Cataract Diagnosis
-- Extract cataract diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cataract_diagnosis AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "cataract_diagnosis"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.4 Diabetic Retinopathy Diagnosis
-- Extract diabetic retinopathy diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetic_retinopathy_diagnosis AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diabetic_retinopathy_diagnosis"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.5 AMD Diagnosis
-- Extract AMD diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_amd_diagnosis AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" AS "amd_diagnosis"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.6 Retinal Vascular Occlusion Stroke in the Eye
-- Extract retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.7 Study Group
-- Extract study group for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_study_group AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."study_group"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.8 Retinal Pigment Epithelium Layer Average
-- Extract retinal pigment epithelium layer average for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinal_pigment_epithelium_layer_average AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."retinal_pigment_epithelium_rpe_average_micrometer" AS "retinal_pigment_epithelium_layer_average"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."person_id",
  age."age",
  glaucoma."glaucoma_diagnosis",
  cataract."cataract_diagnosis",
  diabetic_ret."diabetic_retinopathy_diagnosis",
  amd."amd_diagnosis",
  rvo."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye",
  sg."study_group",
  rpe."retinal_pigment_epithelium_layer_average"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age age ON c."person_id" = age."person_id"
JOIN temp_glaucoma_diagnosis glaucoma ON c."person_id" = glaucoma."person_id"
JOIN temp_cataract_diagnosis cataract ON c."person_id" = cataract."person_id"
JOIN temp_diabetic_retinopathy_diagnosis diabetic_ret ON c."person_id" = diabetic_ret."person_id"
JOIN temp_amd_diagnosis amd ON c."person_id" = amd."person_id"
JOIN temp_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye rvo ON c."person_id" = rvo."person_id"
JOIN temp_study_group sg ON c."person_id" = sg."person_id"
JOIN temp_retinal_pigment_epithelium_layer_average rpe ON c."person_id" = rpe."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;
